__global__: Bilingual contracts present the same content in two columns (commonly Russian + English, but may also be local language + English). Prefer the English column when extracting values; use the other column as fallback only if the English version is empty or clearly less complete. Do not extract both versions, do not translate. Exception: identifiers like INN/TVA/local-tax-IDs are typically only in the local-language column — extract them as-is.
contract_no: Extract the contract identifier by labels "Contract No." / "CONTRACT No." / "Contract number" / "Agreement No." / "Contract #", or their local-language equivalents ("КОНТРАКТ №" / "Контракт №" / "Договор №" in Russian, "SOZLESME No" in Turkish, etc.). Keep the value AS-IS, preserving letters, digits, and hyphens. The identifier may be alphanumeric ("SPRMO22", "TIMEMO25") or digits-only ("220521"). DO NOT strip letters — the alphanumeric form is referenced verbatim by other documents (invoices, specifications, proformas, export declarations) and stripping breaks cross-document matching.
contract_date: Find the contract date by labels "Contract date" / "Date of contract" / "Date", or the date in the header next to the contract number (e.g., "May 20, 2022", "26 May, 2025"). Keep the exact format from the English column (no normalization) and add to contract_date.
seller: Find the seller in the contract preamble by the pattern: '...company "X", country, ... hereinafter referred to as "the Seller"...'. The name is introduced BEFORE the designation "the Seller", not after a label. Alternative source: the "The Seller:" / "Seller:" / "Продавец:" block in the Legal Addresses section at the end. Return the full legal name preserving all corporate-form abbreviations (LTD, STI., CO., LTD, S.A., GmbH, etc.) and add to seller.
buyer: Find the buyer in the contract preamble by the pattern: '...company "X", country, ... hereinafter referred to as "the Buyer"...'. The name is introduced BEFORE the designation "the Buyer". Alternative source: the "The Buyer:" / "Buyer:" / "Покупатель:" block in the Legal Addresses section. Return the full legal name and add to buyer.
total_price: Look in the "Price and Total Value of the Contract" section (typically Section 2) for the sentence "Total value of the Goods supplied under the present contract shall be [amount] [currency]" (commonly clause 2.3, sometimes 2.2). Alternative labels: "Total value" / "Total amount" / "Contract value" / "Total". Extract the numeric amount with currency together as printed (e.g., "30 000 000.00 US dollars", "100 000 000.00 RMB"). The currency may be spelled out ("US dollars", "Chinese RMB") or as an abbreviation ("USD", "RMB"). Ignore the duplicated amount in words shown in parentheses.
incoterms: Extract the full delivery terms phrase from the "Terms of Delivery" section (typically clause 3.1), preserving all enumerated options. Contracts often list MULTIPLE allowed incoterms and places (e.g., "CIF, CPT or CFR Saint Petersburg; CPT Moscow; DAP Moscow or Saint Petersburg; FCA, FOB, EXW Trabzon, Findikli, Ordu, Samsun, Rize 'INCOTERMS 2010'", or "CIF or CFR Saint Petersburg, Vladivostok 'INCOTERMS 2010'"). If the contract delegates incoterms to other documents (e.g., "shall be agreed in Proformas, Specifications and Invoice"), leave empty — this is a meaningful absence, not missing data.
terms_of_payment: Extract the key terms from the "Term of Payment" section (typically Section 4): payment method ("bank transfer"), payment form ("prepayment" / "deferred payment"), deadlines ("up to 90 days from arrival to the territory of the Russian Federation"), and allowed currencies if explicitly listed. Do NOT include detailed clauses about penalties, bank charges distribution, or late-payment fines. Keep the wording from the English column.
bank_details: Extract the SELLER bank details from the Legal Addresses section (block under "The Seller:" / "Seller:" / "Продавец:") — bank name, bank address, account/IBAN, SWIFT/BIC, correspondent bank, beneficiary, etc. Stop before the buyer section. Keep the full block as one multiline text, do not truncate.
